message: New email from Jacob Tomlinson: Re: [astral-sh/uv] Using `uv run` as a task runner (Issue #5903)

metadata.subject: Re: [astral-sh/uv] Using `uv run` as a task runner (Issue #5903)
metadata.preview:
jacobtomlinson left a comment (astral-sh/uv#5903)

For anyone looking for this I made a quick utility called uv-job for doing this with uv.

Add it as a dev dependency

uv add --dev uv-job
